zh.lifeSummary: 當Alessia di Monferrato於1237年出生在義大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂時，她的父親Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat34歲，母親Margueritte de Savoie22歲。她於1266年11月1日與Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年2月6日在她的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alessia di Monferrato于1237年出生在意大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂时，她的父亲Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat34岁，母亲Margueritte de Savoie22岁。她于1266年11月1日与Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1285年2月6日在她的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Alessia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Alessia di Monferrato was born in 1237, in Asti, Piedmont, Italy, her father, Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat, was 34 and her mother, Margueritte de Savoie, was 22. She married Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg on 1 November 1266. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 6 February 1285, in her hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alessia di Monferrato est née en 1237, à Asti, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margueritte de Savoie, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg le 1 novembre 1266. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 février 1285, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alessia di Monferrato 1237 in Asti, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat 34 und ihre Mutter Margueritte de Savoie 22. Sie hat am 1. November 1266 Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. Februar 1285 im Alter von 48 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alessia di Monferrato è nata il nel 1237 nel Asti, Piemonte, Italia, sua padre, Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Margueritte de Savoie, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg il 1 novembre 1266. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 febbraio 1285, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alessia di Monferratoが1237年にイタリアピエモントアスティで生まれた時，父Boniface II Marquess of Montferratは34歳，母Margueritte de Savoieは22歳であった。1266年11月1日にAlbrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1285年2月6日に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alessia di Monferrato(이)가 1237년 이탈리아 피몽 애스티에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margueritte de Savoie(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1266년 11월 1일 Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 2월 6일 그녀의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alessia di Monferrato nasceu em 1237, em Asti, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margueritte de Savoie, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg em 1 de novembro de 1266. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1285, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alessia di Monferrato родилась в 1237 г. в местности асти, пиемонт, Италия, её отцу по имени Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margueritte de Savoie, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 1 ноября 1266 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 февраля 1285 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alessia di Monferrato nació en 1237, en Asti, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Boniface II Marquess of Montferrat, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margueritte de Savoie, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg el 1 de noviembre de 1266. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1285, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años.
